skills.name: spy-competitor-ads
skills.description: Research and download the top 5 highest-performing competitor video ads from the Meta Ad Library, ranked by total views/impressions. Use when a user wants to spy on competitors, find winning ads, research what's working in their category, or build a swipe file.

skills.name: hook-identifier
skills.description: Analyze a video ad to identify its hook — the attention-grabbing opening sequence. Returns the exact timestamp where the hook ends and a reproduction-ready frame-by-frame timeline. Use when a user wants to find the hook in an ad, understand how long it lasts, or get a breakdown detailed enough to recreate the scene.

skills.name: hook-cloner
skills.description: Clone a competitor's ad hook for the user's own brand. Takes hook-identifier output (or a raw video) and generates a brand-new hook video using Seedance 2.0 — preserving the original's structure and emotional beat while swapping in the user's brand identity. Use when a user wants to recreate a hook for their product.

skills.name: static-ad-cloner
skills.description: Clone a static (image) ad for the user's own brand. Takes a reference static ad image and at least one real product image plus a short description, then produces a brand-new static ad using arcads_generate_image — preserving the original's composition, hierarchy, lighting, palette, typography, and copy structure while swapping every brand-specific element for the user's product. Use when a user wants to recreate a static/image ad for their product.

skills.name: winning-hook-pipeline
skills.description: End-to-end pipeline that chains three skills in sequence: spy-competitor-ads → hook-identifier → hook-cloner. Finds the top-performing competitor ads, identifies the best hook, and clones it for the user's brand in one continuous flow. Use when the user wants to do all three steps together.
